creator: alexbestms@wwu.de
text:
mark's probably right. i doubt this port is being used by a lot of people
anyway so moving it into the attic won't be a huge loss.

also fixing the port to work with anything else apart from FreeBSD 5 will
require some work. i tried linking INDEX-5 to INDEX-8 and that made pbrowser
segfault. probably the INDEX format changed somewhere between FreeBSD 5 and 8.

so it's +1 for removing the port.

cheers.
alex
